evidence: PendingRequestsSection renders above Members section in GroupDetailView, visible only to admins (groups.tsx:208)
PendingRequestsSection conditional on pending requests existing (PendingRequestsSection.tsx:90 — returns null if empty)
PendingRequestRow shows requester npub (truncated) and nickname if available (PendingRequestsSection.tsx:33-42)
Approve button calls inviteByNpub(groupId, requesterNpub) via MarmotContext.approveJoinRequest (MarmotContext.tsx approveJoinRequest callback)
After approve: removes PendingJoinRequest from IDB via deletePendingJoinRequest, decrements bell via markJoinRequestsRead
Deny button removes PendingJoinRequest from IDB and decrements bell via markJoinRequestsRead (MarmotContext.tsx denyJoinRequest callback)
If inviteByNpub returns error on approve, error displayed inline and request remains pending (PendingRequestsSection.tsx:66-68)
i18n keys added: pendingRequestsHeading, pendingRequestsApprove, pendingRequestsDeny, pendingRequestsApproveError, pendingRequestsEmpty (en/de)
pendingRequests state and approve/deny actions wired through MarmotContext (MarmotContextValue type, provider value, loadPendingRequestsForGroup, approveJoinRequest, denyJoinRequest)
